description: Run-receipt contract for a paper-concordance check (Stage-2 directional concordance vs the primary publication). This file is a schema + a template instance; no run has been executed, so every run-returned field is null. Fill them ONLY from a real run; never fabricate a hash, timestamp, or result.

paper.title: Genome-scale perturb-seq in primary human CD4+ T cells (Marson)

expected_pins.note: The full SHA-256 of the primary PDF, recomputed independently at run time, MUST begin with this pinned prefix. Record the FULL observed value; do not invent the remaining digits. A mismatch fails the receipt.

primary_pdf_sha256.note: full SHA-256 of the downloaded primary PDF, recomputed at run time

verifier.note: independent verifier identity + result; generator != verifier

run_utc.note: ISO-8601 UTC of the run; null until executed

concordance_result.note: directional concordance summary; null until executed
